creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Upgrade to 1.3.2.

	Changelog at
	<http://www.mcs.anl.gov/research/projects/mpich2/about/index.php?s=news>

	- Set the license.

Fix: Apply the following patch.

	Note: this implies a PORTREVISION bump of several dependencies,
	I'm going to send another patch for:

	- benchmarks/hpl
	- benchmarks/imb
	- benchmarks/mdtest
	- cad/scotch
	- math/blacs
	- math/blocksolve95
	- math/mumps
	- math/parmetis
	- math/petsc
	- math/scalapack
	- math/sdpara
	- math/spooles
	- science/fvm
	- science/mbdyn
	- science/mpqc
	- science/ncs
	- science/pnetcdf
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
